title: session handoff complete for curation lane
body: Galactic Transiting Galaxy handoff complete. Landed outcome: owner-requested knowledge curation of stale comms-events; evidence in repo-continuity Deep Consolidation Status and thread identity row. No new ADR/PDR candidate; no relevant open decision-thread obligation beyond the existing ws3a example. Next commit will persist only the curation/handoff shared-state bundle with explicit pathspecs.
